propositions: Field data shows remediation-eligible plan reviews produced zero novelty drops, ambiguous between a healthy precision-first scorer and a silently failing scorer whose fail-safe returns zero drops on error.

A local uncommitted probe script must call score_novelty live over reconstructed (round-N advisory findings, round-N-1 surfaced findings) pairs from all post-2026-07-12 remediation-eligible plan_review sidecars.
The scorer is DEFECTIVE if live calls error or return empty maps for over 20% of probed pairs, or if known-carryover findings fail to score novelty below 0.7 in the majority of cases.

The scorer is HEALTHY if carryovers score low, genuinely new findings score high, and observed zero drops are explained by priorities at or above 0.4; the drop quadrant is novelty >= 0.7 and priority < 0.4.

The live eval runner cannot run this prompt because run_case dispatches only criterion ids, code-review prompt ids, and three hardcoded agentic reviewers, so run_eval on plan-review-novelty raises ValueError.
A bug ticket for the missing plan-review-novelty dispatch arm must be linked discovered_from this task, and a scorer-repair bug filed only if the scorer is found defective.
